title: GL-Turelifes Glitter Christmas Flowers Large Velvet Magnolia Artificial Floral Ornaments Pack of 6 Folded Flower for Christmas Tree Decoration Wreath Decor Wedding Centerpiece (Rose Gold)
features: 【Big Size Glitter Christmas Flowers】 The unfolding diameter of the flower is appro: 8.7 ''. A large enough Christmas flower, especially suitable for Christmas tree decoration.

【Extremely Beautiful & Good Quality】This Glitter Christmas magnolia is made of high-grade flannelette.The lace has been shaped with chunky glitter. The magnolia flower have 10 petals in total, with two layers of petals,each layer has five petals. The stamen like sparking diamonds stand in the center of the petals. The flowers look very full, layered and three-dimensional.

【With Long Flower Stem】Each artificial Christmas magnolia flowers with long stem. Stem length: 4.8 inch. Easy to place them securely in between Christmas tree branches.You also thrust the pointy end at the bottom of flower first, then bind or simply thrust the other end into the Christmas tree,Christmas wreath so you could easily add it on anywhere you prefer or push it directly into the Christmas tree/Christmas wreath.

【Adjustable Flower Shape】The biggest advantage of this folding Christmas magnolia flower is that it is easy to store, open and reuse. In order to facilitate transportation and not damage the flowers, the magnolia petals are folded, so you need to open the petals to your favorite shape after receiving the flowers.
【Easy to Decorate】Great for your Christmas Tree decoration , wedding decoration, House decor, Christmas wreath decor , Christmas gift and other Christmas decorations.

【Note】Due to long distance transport ,some glitter powder will drop from flowers ,that is normal. If the curling problem of the petals is caused by the damp of the flannel, just unfold the petals and place them in the sun to dry about one hour.
